title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
OUR NEW CURRICULUM

Our efforts to restructure our curriculum with a more project-based focus

By freeCodeCamp

March 7, 2019

Soon the freeCodeCamp curriculum will be 100% project-driven learning. Instead of a series of coding challenges, you'll learn through building projects - step by step. Before we get into the details, let me emphasize: we are not changing the certifications. All 6 certifications will still have the same 5 required projects. We are only changing the optional coding challenges.

After years - years - of pondering these two problems and how to solve them, I slipped, hit my head on the sink, and when I came to I had a revelation! A vision! A picture in my head! A picture of this! This is what makes time travel possible: the flux capacitor!

It wasn't as dramatic as Doc's revelation in Back to the Future. It just occurred to me while I was going for a run. The revelation: the entire curriculum should be a series of projects. Instead of individual coding challenges, we'll just have projects, each with their own seamless series of tests. Each test gives you just enough information to figure out how to get it to pass. (And you can view hints if that isn't enough.)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da kreirate novu komponentu od blockquote unutar vaše komponente .text.
Tvoj element za blockquote mora da dođe nakon tvoje tri elementa od p.
Vaša karakteristika za blockquote treba da ima dve komponente od hr.
Element vašeg blockquote treba da ima element sa p.
Deca od blockquote bi trebala biti u ispravnom redosledu.
Vaša nova funkcija od p mora imati class postavljeno na quote.
Vaša nova funkcija za p treba da ima tekst od The entire curriculum should be a series of projects.
tests.testString: assert(document.querySelector('.text blockquote p')?.innerText === 'The entire curriculum should be a series of projects');

description:
Nakon tri elementa od p unutar vaše komponente sa .text, kreirajte element sa blockquote. Unutar njega, dodajte element sa hr, element sa p koji ima class podešen na quote, i drugi element sa hr.

Daj komponentu za .quote tekst od The entire curriculum should be a series of projects.
